name: Wireless Noise-Canceling Headphones
description: 40-hour battery, plush ear cups, and studio-tuned drivers for daily commutes and focused work.

name: Mechanical Keyboard — Tactile
description: Hot-swappable switches, aluminum frame, and per-key RGB with macOS and Windows layouts.

name: 4K UltraWide Monitor
description: 34-inch curved panel, 144Hz, HDR400. Ideal for creative suites and immersive gaming.

name: Mirrorless Camera Kit
description: 24MP sensor, in-body stabilization, and a versatile 24–70mm lens for travel and portraits.

name: Merino Crew Sweater
description: Temperature-regulating merino wool in a relaxed fit. Machine washable on gentle.

name: Selvedge Denim Jeans
description: 14oz Japanese denim with a straight taper. Breaks in beautifully over time.

name: Trail Running Shoes
description: Vibram outsole, breathable upper, and rock plate for technical terrain.

name: Linen Summer Shirt
description: Lightweight European linen with mother-of-pearl buttons. Naturally wrinkled texture.

name: Ceramic Table Lamp
description: Hand-glazed base with brass fittings and a warm linen shade.

name: Pour-Over Coffee Set
description: Glass dripper, gooseneck kettle, and ceramic mugs for slow mornings.

name: Wool Throw Blanket
description: Soft lambswool in a herringbone weave. Perfect for sofas and reading nooks.

name: Indoor Plant — Fiddle Leaf
description: Large statement plant in a terracotta pot. Care guide included.
